text: The world ‘valvas’ refers to a double or folding door, not merely to any type of door.
The word ‘vici’ can refer to a street, but it can also refer to a neighborhood or small area within a larger city.

The ‘After him’ of this verse refers to the son of Parosh, two verses previous. The verse about the temple servants was likely interposed between those two verses at some point in the redaction of the book as it developed.
